findings.title: Status parsing now accepts non-worker processes with a worker address flag
findings.impact: Any process whose command line contains `-worker_address=` and a parseable address now passes this filter, even if it is not the datasystem worker binary. In that case `dscli status` can report unrelated helper, wrapper, or test processes as live workers and return a wrong cluster status.
findings.fix: Keep the worker-binary check, or replace it with an equivalent executable identity check while still extracting the worker address from the flag.
